'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 132''' was the one hundred thirty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]. ''It was released on [[July 7]], [[2004]], and was authored by [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Liz Holliday]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Michael Schiavetta]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
